lessons.title: Variables: let, const, and var
lessons.description: Understand the differences between variable declarations in modern JavaScript.

lessons.title: Arrow Functions
lessons.description: Write concise functions with arrow syntax and understand `this` binding.

lessons.description: Embed expressions in strings and work with multi-line strings easily.

lessons.title: Destructuring Objects and Arrays
lessons.description: Extract values from objects and arrays with a clean syntax.

lessons.title: Spread and Rest Operators
lessons.description: Use `...` to spread elements or collect them into arrays.
